name: Sister's Curriculum After Story
short_description: The Story of Tutoring Top 1% Repeat Students Sisters, After.
detailed_description:
【Woo Yeonhee After】

The tutoring sessions are over, but is love only just starting?

Life abroad feels daunting and the road ahead seems endlessly long…

Clumsy yet wholehearted, the only way forward is to dive in!

The awkward yet heartfelt love story of Woo Yeonhee.

【Woo Yuri After】

One day, a bucket list was found in Woo Yuri’s drawer.

A past filled with nothing but regrets, and a mountain of unfulfilled dreams!

Can tomorrow’s Woo Yuri look back on today with joy?

Join Woo Yuri in creating unforgettable memories.

Features of the Work

0. A sequel to Sisters’ Curriculum: After Story

1. A romance simulation featuring two heroines

2. Full voice acting by professional voice actors

3. Enhanced immersion with full CG and SD CG
